title: Top anime hype scenes — taste catalog, Sept 2024
html:
TL;DR

  • A short list of Yahir's top anime hype scenes — written Sept 2024, modified through Feb 2025:
    • Berserk Guts going against divine powers to drive his sword.
    • JJK Yuji clawing the ground after losing his friends.
    • Devilman Crybaby running unhinged.
    • Chainsaw Man Denji going wild for 3 days in the other-dimensional hotel.
    • AOT Levi slashing all titans + getting the rock thrower.
    • Tanjiro (Demon Slayer).
    • Vinland Saga young Thorfinn double-daggering an entire fortified castle.
    • Mob Psycho 100 unraveling emotions.
  • Reads as a canon of male-protagonist berserker / soul-fire moments — every pick involves a character who transcends through unhinged commitment.

Pattern observed

Every selected scene is the moment a protagonist abandons restraint and goes pure-soul-fire.

Why it matters in the graph

  • Direct mirror of the line in 2026 02 26 i want to be the motherfucker — "pure soul fire, God" — Yahir's anime canon and his self-aspirational identity converge on the same emotional register.
  • Pairs with 2023 07 15 things to watch (live-action taste) for a complete taste-as-identity picture: live-action favors melancholic-meditative (Magnolia, Lost in Translation), anime favors berserker-transcendence (Berserk, Vinland Saga). The two halves balance.
  • Provides concrete imagery for the magnetic aura / heightened perception trigger / "internal flame" cluster.

Open questions

  • Where does Yahir rank Mob Psycho 100 — favorite, or just on the list?
  • Is the "n" at the end an unfinished pick (Naruto, Neon Genesis)?

Wikilinks
